member.name: DevLogos
member.summary: Gathers and displays all development logos when a Dungine game is launched.

member.name: GetAllDevLogos
member.summary: Gathers all of the development logos.
member.remarks:
This calls the following methods:
GetStandardDevLogos() Get the standard development logos.
GetGameDevLogos() Get the game-specific development logos.
member.returns: All of the development logos as a BitmapImage list.

member.name: GetStandardDevLogos
member.summary: Gathers all of the standard development logos that are included with every Dungine game.

remarks.para: These logos let players know that your game uses the Dungine engine. Please do not remove or modify these logos.

member.returns: All of the standard development logos as a BitmapImage list.

member.name: GetGameDevLogos
member.summary: Gathers all of the standard development logos that are included with every Dungine game.

remarks.para: These are your logos for your game.

member.returns: All of the standard development logos as a BitmapImage list.

member.name: DisplayDevLogos
member.summary: Shows all development logos on a splash screen.
member.param: All of the development logos as a BitmapImage list.
member.remarks: There will probably be a few animation options at some point.
